item.text: {"output":"Implemented T1 in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.ts` and checkpointed batch progress to `.megaplan/plans/design-a-robust-fix-for-stale-20260413-0518/execution_batch_1.json`. `resolveGroupTrackId()` now fast-paths when all group clips still live on the stored row, otherwise scans rows and returns the row with the highest clip match count, falling back to the stored `trackId` for orphaned groups. `findGroupForTrack()` now preserves `(shotId, trackId)` identity by accepting an exact stored-key match only when it still resolves to the requested track, then falling back to a resolved scan across same-shot groups. Verification passed on the targeted module test and on the full video editor suite before and after the change.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.ts",".megaplan/plans/design-a-robust-fix-for-stale-20260413-0518/execution_batch_1.json"],"commands_run":["git status --short","npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/","npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts","npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/"],"deviations":[],"task_updates":[{"task_id":"T1","status":"done","executor_notes":"Added `resolveGroupTrackId(group, rows)` and `findGroupForTrack(groups, shotId, trackId, rows)` in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.ts`. `resolveGroupTrackId` checks the stored row first, returns immediately when all group clips still live there, otherwise scans rows and returns the row with the most matching clipIds, falling back to the stored `trackId` when no live clips are found. `findGroupForTrack` now preserves composite `(shotId, trackId)` identity by only accepting an exact stored-key match if it still resolves to the requested track, then falling back to a resolved scan across same-shot groups. Verification: baseline `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` passed before edits; post-change `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts` and `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` both passed.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.ts"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/","npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts","npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC1","executor_note":"Yes. `findGroupForTrack()` still keys by `(shotId, trackId)`: it only returns an exact stored-key match if `resolveGroupTrackId()` confirms that group actually resolves to the requested track, otherwise it falls back to scanning same-shot groups by resolved track. In the multi-track-per-shot case, `findGroupForTrack(groups, 'shot-1', 'V1', rows)` therefore returns the group whose clips actually live on `V1`, even when that group's stored `trackId` is stale."}]}
